abilities.name: Pack Bond
abilities.description: Once per encounter you may use your Free Action to grant an ally Digimon within 3 spaces +3 to their next damage roll. You protect what matters to you, even if you won't say it out loud.

abilities.name: Solo Run
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon is the only Digimon currently active on your side, they gain +2 to all attack rolls and +2 damage. You don't need a team to be dangerous.

abilities.name: Cold Front
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: Once per encounter when your Digimon is attacked, you may use your Free Action to grant them +4 to their Reliability for that attack only. The wall goes up before the hit lands.

abilities.name: Rival's Fire
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 1 ability, Friendship rank 4
abilities.description: When an ally Digimon is reduced to 0 HP in the same encounter, your Digimon gains +4 to their next attack roll and +4 damage on that attack. Loss makes them dangerous.

abilities.name: I Work Alone
abilities.description: Solo Run now activates whenever your Digimon acts before any allied Digimon has taken a turn this round, even if other Digimon are present. First in is always alone.

abilities.name: Stand Together
abilities.description: Pack Bond can now target any ally Digimon anywhere on the battlefield, not just within 3 spaces. When you decide to protect someone, distance does not matter.

abilities.name: Warp Digivolution
abilities.requirements: At least 1 Row 2 ability, Friendship rank 5
abilities.description: Your Digimon can now digivolve two stages at once in a single Basic Action, skipping the stage in between. Pay the combined Hope cost of both stages minus 2 to initiate. Warp Digivolution cannot be forced — full cost must always be paid. See Season 1 Rules for full details.

abilities.name: The Wall
abilities.description: Once per session when an attack would reduce an ally Digimon to 0 HP, you may declare The Wall before the damage is applied. The damage is divided evenly between the ally Digimon and your Digimon — both take half, rounded down. The ally always survives at minimum 1 HP. Your Digimon takes their half normally.
